events.title: UNCLE BOONMEE WHO CAN RECALL HIS PAST LIVES (2010)
events.description:
Philadelphia Area Horror Meetup Group
# Uncle Boonmee Who Can Recall His Past Lives

**Original title:** Loong Boonmee raleuk chat
2010 - 1hr 54mins
Fantasy/Drama
**Language:** Thai and Lao, with a few scenes also featuring French, with English subtitles.

Dying of kidney disease, a man spends his last, somber days with family, including the ghost of his wife and a forest spirit who used to be his son, on a rural northern Thailand farm.

events.title: Dinner & A Movie: HER PRIVATE HELL
events.description:
Philadelphia Area Horror Meetup Group
Come watch a movie with us and have dinner/drinks after!

**Sign up for the movie here!**

**If you want to sign up for dinner, please join our Discord! We have such a large group now that we have to set maximum spots for dinner.**

**On Discord you will find an event for the movie and an event for dinner. Only members attending the movie can sign up for dinner. Thank you!**
**Dinner Event Link in Discord:** https://discord.gg/AxaBEmzA?event=1527141310920786012

**Showtime:** 6:45pm

**Location:** Regal UA King of Prussia
300 Goddard Blvd, King Of Prussia, PA 19406

**Her Private Hell**
2026 - 1hr 50mins
Sci-fi/Psychological Thriller/Horror

A troubled young woman searches for her father as a mysterious mist engulfs a futuristic metropolis, unleashing a deadly and elusive entity. Her quest collides with an American G.I. who's on a harrowing odyssey to rescue his daughter from hell.

events.title: Widow's Bay - Season 1
events.description:
Philadelphia Area Horror Meetup Group
Join us every Sunday night as we stream Season 1 of Widow's Bay!

**July 12 -** Episode 1 - 4 ***(first night only goes to 11pm)***
**July 19 -** Episode 5-7
**July 26** \- Episode 8\-10

**Widow's Bay**
2026
Comedy/Horror
A New England mayor trying to boost tourism on his island must navigate strange events suggesting it might be cursed.
